title: Detailed Equipment Files (01–10)
normalized_content:
Phase 0.5B – Detailed Equipment Files (01–10)
Organization: Aetheris BioPharma Private Limited
Scope: Detailed equipment dossiers for critical manufacturing and utility assets
Date: 2026-07-11
Version: R0
All equipment files below follow Aetheris numbering conventions and are consistent with
Phases 0.1–0.4, Master Index 0.5A, Core SOPs 0.5B, Batch Records 0.5B, and
Investigations/CAPAs 0.5B.
Equipment File 01
Equipment ID: EQ-ST-01-002
Name: Vial Filling Machine VFM-01
Area: Sterile Block 1
Line: ML-ST-01
Site: VISK
Criticality: Direct Impact (GMP)
Owner: Anil Verma

● VISK-ST-SOP-ST-0305-R0 (Vial Filling Operation)

● FPP-2001 (Injectra 1 g)

This completes Phase 0.5B – Equipment Files (01–10).

Next, I can:
● Expand the incoming evidence library with 2–3 additional realistic event packages
(OSD, API, data-integrity scenarios), or
● Start building a machine-readable knowledge graph (JSON/CSV of nodes and edges)
from all this data, or
● Generate detailed supplier files (with audits, performance, certificates, and linked
complaints/CAPAs) for key suppliers like SUP-003 and SUP-008.
Which would you like next?
